items.title: VI Live: weergaloze omhaal zet Excelsior op 0-2 tegen NAC-tiental
items.summary: Op vrijdagavond staan NAC Breda en Excelsior tegenover elkaar in de Eredivisie. De Bredanaars wachten al tien duels op een zege, de Rotterdammers vijf. Lukt het een van beide clubs deze negatieve reeks te beëindigen? Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: Boycot van Ronaldo kost Al-Nassr bijna dure punten, fans steunen Portugees
items.summary: De Cristiano Ronaldo-soap in Saoedi-Arabië kreeg vrijdagavond een nieuw hoofdstuk. De Portugese superster is ontevreden over de gang van zaken in de competitie. Vrijdag deed hij niet mee met de wedstrijd van Al-Nassr, dat het opnam tegen Al-Ittihad. Een late, rake strafschop van Sadio Mané behoedde de club van Ronaldo voor duur puntenverlies.

items.title: Is Pep Guardiola getting ready to leave Man City? Only he knows
items.summary: Guardiola's mood of late has invited fresh speculation as to whether he's going to step down as Man City manager at the end of the season. Only time will tell.

items.title: Ronaldo misses 2nd Al Nassr game amid dispute
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo missed a second straight game for Al Nassr amid his ongoing dispute with the Saudi Pro League.

items.title: Utd's Carrick relishes reunion with Spurs boss
items.summary: Michael Carrick finds himself up against Thomas Frank just five months on from interviewing the Tottenham boss.

items.title: Arteta apologises to Rosenior after 'disrespect'
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has apologised to Chelsea after Liam Rosenior accused the north London side of a "lack of respect" during the warm-ups before Tuesday's Carabao Cup semifinal, second leg.

items.title: Colombia star Rodríguez joins Loons through WC
items.summary: Minnesota United on Friday officially signed Colombia international star forward James Rodríguez through this summer's World Cup.

items.title: Leeds v Nottingham Forest: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Table | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Dominic A couple of pre-match reads for you with another big Premier League weekend almost upon us. Here’s what Farke said on the survival equation for his team now: We need one point average [from 38 games] to stay in this league, so we need 12 points to have this average. This means three wins and three draws, whatever – six positive results from the last 14 games. The last 12 games we’ve played, we had 10 positive results. I would back my players to get six positive results. I want all 14 to be positive, but I’m confident we are capable to win enough to stay in this league. Continue reading...

items.title: Opmerkelijk: Krastev speelt al 5,5 jaar bij, maar nog nooit vóór Lommel
items.summary: Filip Krastev (24) is per 1 juli 2020 contractspeler van Lommel SK. Toch zou het goed kunnen dat de Bulgaar geen idee heeft hoe hij het snelste naar het stadion van de club moet rijden. Krastev heeft sinds medio 2020 zo'n 150 wedstrijden gespeeld, maar geen enkele voor Lommel. Dat zit als volgt.

items.title: Sonia Bompastor agrees Chelsea contract extension with club off WSL title pace
items.summary: Head coach’s previous deal ran until 2028 Bompastor won domestic treble in first season Sonia Bompastor has agreed a contract extension as Chelsea’s head coach, the Guardian can reveal, as the club issue a strong signal of trust and confidence in the Frenchwoman. Bompastor has been in charge at Chelsea since the summer of 2024, when she succeeded Emma Hayes on a deal to 2028. The 45-year-old completed a domestic season unbeaten during her first year and won a treble, as well as reaching the Women’s Champions League semi-finals. Continue reading...

items.title: Glasner legt uit wanneer Mateta knoop doorhakt over operatie
items.summary: Jean-Philippe Mateta gaat volgende week beslissen of hij zich laat opereren aan zijn knie of niet. Dat vertelde Crystal Palace-manager Oliver Glasner vrijdag op de persconferentie in aanloop naar het Premier League-duel met Brighton & Hove Albion.

Raducanu beats Oliynykova to reach first final since the US Open

items.title: Voetbalnomade James Rodríguez wil via de MLS naar het WK
items.summary: James Rodríguez vervolgt zijn loopbaan in de Major League Soccer. De 34-jarige Colombiaan heeft getekend voor Minnesota United, afgelopen jaar vierde in de Western Conference.

items.summary: Nasser Hussain make his predictions for the 2026 Men's T20 World Cup, which is live in full on Sky Sports from February 7 to March 8.

items.title: Raducanu makes first final since 2021 US Open in Cluj | Boulter in Ostrava final
items.summary: Emma Raducanu is through to her first final since winning the 2021 US Open after beating Oleksandra Oliynykova in a "brutal" three-set semi-final at the Transylvania Open.

items.title: Paul could target Tommy Fury rematch in UK next
items.summary: Jake Paul is to resume his boxing career later this year after surgery on his broken jaw and could target a rematch with Tommy Fury in the UK.

items.title: Why should I not express how I feel? - Guardiola
items.summary: Pep Guardiola defended his stance of speaking up about global conflicts by asking, "why should I not express what I feel, just because I am a manager?"
